author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. apply_binary_op_expr — new function that converts IrOpKind binary ops (Add/Sub/Mul/Div) to Expr::BinOp
2. lower_fused_elementwise rewritten to load ALL inputs at loop start, initialize accumulator from first input, apply binary ops against subsequent inputs and unary ops against the accumulator
3. lower_to_loops now uses is_elementwise gate (unary + binary) instead of all_unary, so mixed chains like x+y→relu get fused into a single loop
4. New test: test_lower_fused_multi_input verifying x+y→relu fusion
5. All 224 JIT tests pass
